name: @clearline/domain-org-security
description: Pure, framework-agnostic organization security rules (US-CW-040): IPv4 CIDR parsing/matching with the self-lockout guard, the mocked SAML connection-test evaluation + certificate fingerprinting, and the idle session-timeout option set. No data-access or UI dependencies, mirrors libs/domain/integrations.

metadata.scope: Domain lib for EPIC-CW-022 (US-CW-040 Organization Security & Compliance).
